name: Smithing Close
description: Intense focused craft — heat, spark, effort visible in the body.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Close on figures at the forge, faces lit by orange glow.
{setting}. Tight framing on hands and tools amid sparks and heat.
{setting}. Close on laborers at work, sweat glistening, muscles taut with effort.

1: {subject}, centered in frame, facing three-quarters left.
2: {subject}, left side of frame, facing right.
{subject}, right side of frame, facing left.
3: {subject}, upper center of frame, facing forward.
4: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left.

background_pool: Dark stone walls of a forge, glowing coals in the background, tools hanging on pegs
Workshop interior lit by forge fire, warm orange light on rough-hewn walls, metal stock visible
Blackened brick and iron of a smithy, quenching barrel steaming in the corner, low ceiling
action_pool: arms swinging a heavy hammer down with full body force
hands gripping a tool with white-knuckled intensity
leaning hard into their weight, shoulders bunched
one arm raised high overhead, the other braced against their body
head tilted down, eyes narrowed in deep focus
wrist flicking sharply, fingers precise and controlled
shoulders rolling forward, back curved with sustained effort
forearm tensed, veins raised, grip locked
head turned away, one hand raised to shield their face
chest heaving, mouth slightly open, breath visible in cold air
